---
name: humanizer
description: Rewrite text to sound natural, specific, and human while removing AI-isms, generic filler, corporate tone, and robotic phrasing.
tags: [writing, rewrite, humanize, tone, style, aiisms]
---
# Humanizer
## When to Use
Use when the user asks to humanize text, remove AI-sounding phrasing, make writing more natural, or adapt tone while preserving meaning.
## Do Not Use When
Do not use for academic citation verification, code implementation, or data analysis.
## Required Inputs
Source text, target audience, language, desired tone, and constraints on meaning preservation.
## Workflow
1. Identify generic AI phrases, inflated transitions, and unnatural rhythm.
2. Rewrite with concrete wording, varied sentence length, and user-specified tone.
3. Preserve facts, citations, names, and technical terms.
4. Return the revised text and optional rationale.
